<features>
- observable feature: flower has heart-shaped petals
- observable feature: flower is white
- observable feature: flower has a dark center
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has heart-shaped petals AND flower is white] THEN [87]
- IF [flower has a spiky, upright inflorescence AND flower is pink] THEN [92]
- IF [flower has three upright petals and three drooping petals AND flower is yellow] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a flower with heart-shaped petals and is white, which matches the features of class 87.
</rule_check>
<response>87</response>

- observable feature: flower has a tall, upright, pink, spiky central structure
- observable feature: small purple flowers are present at the base of the central structure
- observable feature: long, thin green leaves surround the flower
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has a tall, upright, pink, spiky central structure AND small purple flowers at its base AND long, thin green leaves] THEN [92]
- IF [flower is yellow with three distinct petals and a prominent central pattern] THEN [14]
- IF [flower is pink with heart-shaped petals and a dark center] THEN [87]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows a tall, upright, pink, spiky central structure, small purple flowers at its base, and long, thin green leaves, which matches the features described in the IF condition for class 92.
</rule_check>
<response>92</response>
